name: Notional amount schedule end date—Leg 1
description: These data elements describe the notional amount schedule of Leg 1 in terms of each schedule period’s end date applicable in the period.
optionalityRules: Required, if applicable, for certain Action types and not reported for other Action types.

Required for transactions in any asset class where Notional amount—Leg 1 is not a constant value over the entire term of the OTC derivative, in particular where: (a) the asset class of the UPI that is reported is the interest rate asset class; and (b) the value of the ‘Notional Schedule’ attribute of the UPI that is reported is not equal to ‘Constant’.
Values for Notional amount schedule end date—Leg 1 may be optionally reported.
End date is not required to be reported if it is back-to-back with the effective date of the next period.
valueRules: Each time period has an effective date and end date, and each effective date and end date must be greater than the corresponding date in the immediately preceding period.
If reported, the formats of the values conform to the 2024 Rules specifications.
